ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user last interacted with the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is an administrator */,
  "is_moderator" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a moderator */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* User's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum's purpose and rules */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was created */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user designated as the forum moderator */,
  "forum_type" TEXT /* Type of forum (e.g., public, private, hidden) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the forum's icon */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the thread belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the thread was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the thread */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the thread is locked */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the thread is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the thread */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity in the thread */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the post belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the post is editable by the user */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been edited */,
  "last_edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last edited */,
  "last_edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the post */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image associated with the post */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the reply is responding to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the reply is editable by the user */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply has been edited */,
  "last_edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last edited */,
  "last_edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the reply */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image associated with the reply */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video associated with the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, reply, edit, delete) */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread involved in the activity */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post involved in the activity */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply involved in the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator or administrator performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., lock thread, ban user) */,
  "action_target" TEXT /* Target of the moderation action (e.g., thread ID, user ID) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the moderation action (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email_notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if email notifications are enabled */,
  "dark_mode_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if dark mode is enabled */,
  "default_forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default forum for the user */,
  "signature" TEXT /* User's signature, appended to posts and replies */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was submitted */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator or administrator who handled the report */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the thread */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_subscriptions_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_tags_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_tags_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)
